summary: Iteration 148: Duplica Preventivo (Clone Quote) Feature - ALL BACKEND AND FRONTEND TESTS PASS. Backend POST /api/preventivi/{prev_id}/clone endpoint works correctly. Frontend 'Crea Copia' button in editor and Copy icon in list page both functional.

details: Clone has today's date in created_at
Clone preserves client_id, subject, normativa, notes
Clone lines have fresh line_ids (no overlap with source)
Clone lines preserve description, quantity, unit_price, vat_rate
Cloned preventivo can be retrieved via GET
'Crea Copia' button (data-testid='btn-clone-preventivo') visible in editor toolbar for existing preventivi
'Crea Copia' button correctly hidden for new preventivi (/preventivi/new)
Clicking 'Crea Copia' calls clone API and navigates to new preventivo
Copy icon button (data-testid='btn-clone-{id}') visible in each row's actions
Clicking Copy icon clones and navigates to new preventivo editor
44 clone buttons found for 44 preventivo rows

critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes/preventivi.py lines 558-640: clone_preventivo endpoint properly implemented with atomic counter for new number
Backend correctly copies all fields except _id, preventivo_id, number, created_at, updated_at, status, total_invoiced, converted_commessa_id
Backend generates fresh line_ids for cloned lines (line 591)
Frontend PreventivoEditorPage.js lines 362-370: handleClone function properly calls clone API and navigates
Frontend PreventivoEditorPage.js lines 542-547: 'Crea Copia' button with correct data-testid, only shown when !isNew
Frontend PreventiviPage.js lines 69-76: handleClone function for list page with e.stopPropagation()
Frontend PreventiviPage.js lines 155-157: Copy icon button with data-testid='btn-clone-{id}' in row actions
seed_data_creation: Test preventivi created and cleaned up during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 148 fully verified the 'Duplica Preventivo' (Clone Quote) feature. Backend: POST /api/preventivi/{prev_id}/clone endpoint creates cloned document with new ID, new number (PRV-YYYY-NNNN), status='bozza', today's date, all lines copied with fresh line_ids, totals recalculated, converted_commessa_id=null, total_invoiced=0. Frontend: 'Crea Copia' button in editor toolbar (data-testid='btn-clone-preventivo') for existing preventivi only. Copy icon button in list page (data-testid='btn-clone-{id}') in each row. Both entry points call clone API and navigate to new preventivo. Toast notification confirms duplication. All 20 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass.

mocked_apis.note: All tests use real API endpoints and MongoDB database
